text: The Lord is close to the brokenhearted and saves those who are crushed in spirit.
Do not fear, for I am with you; do not be dismayed, for I am your God.
Do not be anxious about anything; in every situation, by prayer and petition, present your requests to God.
Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.
For I know the plans I have for you, plans to give you hope and a future.
Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding.
Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged, for the Lord your God will be with you.
Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you.
God is our refuge and strength, an ever-present help in trouble.
Be joyful in hope, patient in affliction, faithful in prayer.
Bear with each other and forgive one another if any of you has a grievance.
Love is patient, love is kind; it always protects, always trusts, always hopes, always perseveres.
